prompt:
You are a senior credit analyst. Given a company's total assets, total equity, revenue and net profit, produce a one-paragraph diagnostic with: (1) D/E using (assets - equity) / equity, (2) a net profit margin call, (3) a one-word rating (strong, acceptable, or weak). Do not invent numbers.

Input:
Company: Acme Recyclers (Pty) Ltd. Total assets: R1,200m. Total equity: R500m. Revenue: R820m. Net profit: R48m.
expected_output: Acme Recyclers shows D/E of 1.40x (debt proxy R700m / equity R500m) — moderate leverage typical of a recycler. Net profit margin is 5.9% (R48m/R820m), acceptable but below pre-pandemic norms. Rating: acceptable, albeit with margin pressure.
